description: Salesforce Opportunity to NetSuite SalesOrder. Validated in DataWeave Playground.
criticalRules: entity.id must be netsuite_customer_id__c (internal ID), never Salesforce AccountId
item.item.id must be netsuite_item_id__c. Null = route to dead letter queue, never empty string
externalId must always be set to Salesforce Opportunity.Id for idempotency on retry
tranDate format is M/d/yyyy (no leading zeros). NetSuite rejects ISO 8601
currency.refName is full English name (US Dollar not USD)
OpportunityLineItems.records can be null - always default to empty array
NetSuite item array structure is item.items (nested), not flat array
dateConversion: fun toNSDate(d) = if (d != null and d != '') (d as Date {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'}) as String {format: 'M/d/yyyy'} else null
commonFailures: INVALID_KEY_OR_REF on entity: netsuite_customer_id__c is null or empty
tranDate invalid: date passed as ISO instead of M/d/yyyy
Amount discrepancy: NetSuite recalculates qty x rate, bypasses TotalPrice with discounts
